sections.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary is an essential building block of English. Formula: Team/player + verb + sports noun | Sound adjective + noun | Number + multiply/divide + number. Rules: Sports collocations: 'play a sport', 'win/lose a match', 'score a goal' | Sound adjectives (loud, soft) describe voice/noise; 'silence' and 'echo' are nouns | Maths operation review: multiply, divide, total — same pattern as Day 63 | Factory + sports + sound + maths words often combine in real workplace/stadium contexts
sections.formula: Team/player + verb + sports noun | Sound adjective + noun | Number + multiply/divide + number

examples.hindi: फैक्ट्री की असेंबली लाइन तेज़ चलती है।
examples.english: The factory's assembly line runs fast.

examples.hindi: क्रिकेट भारत में सबसे लोकप्रिय खेल है।
examples.english: Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
The football team won the match.
Hockey is our national game.
I like playing badminton.

examples.hindi: उसने दौड़ में पहला स्थान पाया।
examples.english: He got first place in the race.

sections.title: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Team/player + verb + sports noun | Sound adjective + noun | Number + multiply/divide + number

examples.hindi: खिलाड़ी मैदान में दौड़ रहे हैं।
examples.english: The players are running on the field.
The team performed well.
The match is tomorrow evening.

examples.hindi: गेंद सीमा के बाहर चली गई।
examples.english: The ball went out of the boundary.
He scored a goal and won the match.
This sound is very loud.

sections.hindiTitle: Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग

sections.formula: Team/player + verb + sports noun | Sound adjective + noun | Number + multiply/divide + number

examples.english: His voice is very soft.

examples.hindi: फैक्ट्री में बहुत शोर होता है।
examples.english: There is a lot of noise in the factory.
There was complete silence at night.
An echo was heard in the mountains.

sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary. Common mistakes are highlighted here.

examples.english: I like listening to music.

examples.hindi: तीन को पाँच से गुणा करने पर पंद्रह होता है।
examples.english: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.

examples.hindi: बीस को पाँच से भाग देने पर चार होता है।
examples.english: Dividing twenty by five gives four.
The total number is one hundred.
